title: Flat list export
excerpt: Provide a check-box option in the Export dialog to export the list in a Flat format.  This format would have one header row with all rows.  The Group Name would be a column, and the group would be repeated for each recor…

posts.author: KenBrey (Ken Brey)
posts.cookedHtml: Provide a check-box option in the Export dialog to export the list in a Flat format. This format would have one header row with all rows. The Group Name would be a column, and the group would be repeated for each record in the group. This format would make processing in Excel easier.
